description: Comprehensive 4-panel figure: protein architecture, paralog comparison, geometry, and verdict summary
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(16, 12))

# Panel 1: Protein architecture diagram
ax1 = axes[0, 0]
ax1.set_xlim(0, 500)
ax1.set_ylim(0, 4)

# Draw architecture
# Signal peptide
ax1.barh(2, 20, height=0.8, left=0, color='#95A5A6', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
ax1.text(10, 2, 'SP', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold', color='white')

# N-terminal disordered region
ax1.barh(2, 312, height=0.8, left=20, color='#FF6B6B', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5, alpha=0.6)
ax1.text(176, 2, 'Disordered N-terminal extension\n(312 aa, pLDDT ~40)', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8)
# Hatching for disorder
for x in range(30, 330, 10):
    ax1.plot([x, x+5], [1.7, 2.3], color='gray', linewidth=0.3, alpha=0.5)

# SOD domain
ax1.barh(2, 143, height=0.8, left=332, color='#4ECDC4', edgecolor='black', linewidth=1)
ax1.text(403, 2, 'Cu/Zn-SOD domain\n(143 aa, pLDDT 94.3)', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')

# Mark active site residues
active_sites = [364, 366, 375, 381, 389, 400, 403, 442, 465, 468]
for pos in active_sites:
    ax1.plot(pos, 1.5, 'r^', markersize=6)

# Labels
ax1.text(250, 3.5, 'RvY_17310 (A0A1D1W3Y1) — 475 aa', ha='center', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')
ax1.text(250, 3.0, 'Architecture: Signal peptide | Disordered spacer | Cu/Zn-SOD catalytic domain', 
         ha='center', fontsize=10, style='italic', color='#555555')
ax1.set_xlabel('Residue Position', fontsize=10)
ax1.set_yticks([])
ax1.spines['left'].set_visible(False)
ax1.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax1.spines['right'].set_visible(False)

# Panel 2: Comparative conservation across R. varieornatus SODs
ax2 = axes[0, 1]
genes = ['RvY_17310\n(475 aa)', 'RvY_03757\n(193 aa)', 'RvY_00651\n(154 aa)', 'RvY_09480\n(317 aa)', 
         'RvY_00650\n(292 aa)', 'RvY_10893\n(185 aa)', 'RvY_13070\n(194 aa)', 'RvY_13431\n(546 aa)']
conserved_counts = [10, 10, 10, 10, 10, 10, 9, 8]
colors = ['#2ECC71' if c == 10 else '#F39C12' if c >= 9 else '#E74C3C' for c in conserved_counts]

# Highlight target
edge_colors = ['red' if i == 0 else 'black' for i in range(len(genes))]
edge_widths = [3 if i == 0 else 0.5 for i in range(len(genes))]

bars = ax2.barh(range(len(genes)), conserved_counts, color=colors, 
                edgecolor=edge_colors, linewidth=edge_widths, height=0.7)

ax2.set_yticks(range(len(genes)))
ax2.set_yticklabels(genes, fontsize=9)
ax2.set_xlabel('Active Site Residues Conserved (out of 10)', fontsize=10)
ax2.set_title('Cu/Zn-SOD Active Site Conservation\nacross R. varieornatus Paralogs', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax2.set_xlim(0, 11)
ax2.axvline(x=10, color='green', linestyle='--', alpha=0.3)

for i, v in enumerate(conserved_counts):
    label = f'{v}/10 ✓' if v == 10 else f'{v}/10'
    ax2.text(v + 0.15, i, label, va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold' if v == 10 else 'normal')

# Add note about target
ax2.annotate('TARGET', xy=(10, 0), xytext=(8, -0.7), fontsize=9, color='red', fontweight='bold',
             arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='red'))

# Panel 3: Geometry comparison bar chart
ax3 = axes[1, 0]
measurements = ['His↔His\n(Cu-lig1↔lig2)', 'His↔His\n(lig1↔bridge)', 'His↔His\n(lig1↔lig4)',
                'His↔His\n(lig2↔bridge)', 'His↔His\n(lig2↔lig4)', 'His↔His\n(bridge↔lig4)']
human_dists = [5.80, 4.40, 4.91, 4.95, 3.37, 6.32]
rvy_dists = [6.27, 4.14, 4.97, 5.18, 3.34, 6.04]
deltas = [r - h for r, h in zip(rvy_dists, human_dists)]

y_pos = np.arange(len(measurements))
width = 0.35
ax3.barh(y_pos - width/2, human_dists, width, label='Human SOD1 crystal\n(PDB 2SOD)', color='#3498DB')
ax3.barh(y_pos + width/2, rvy_dists, width, label='RvY_17310 AlphaFold\nmodel', color='#E67E22')

ax3.set_yticks(y_pos)
ax3.set_yticklabels(measurements, fontsize=9)
ax3.set_xlabel('Ligand-Ligand Distance (Å)', fontsize=10)
ax3.set_title('Cu-Site Active Site Geometry\n(Crystal Structure vs AlphaFold Model)', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax3.legend(fontsize=8, loc='lower right')

for i, d in enumerate(deltas):
    color = '#2ECC71' if abs(d) < 0.3 else '#F39C12'
    ax3.text(max(human_dists[i], rvy_dists[i]) + 0.1, i, f'Δ={d:+.2f}Å', 
             va='center', fontsize=8, color=color)

# Panel 4: Summary verdict
ax4 = axes[1, 1]
ax4.axis('off')

verdict_text = """VERDICT: GO:0004784 ANNOTATION SUPPORTED

Evidence Summary:
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
✓ All 4 Cu-binding His conserved
✓ All 3 Zn-binding residues conserved  
✓ Cu/Zn-bridging His conserved
✓ Disulfide bond Cys pair conserved
✓ Electrostatic loop Arg conserved
✓ ESL net charge preserved (+0 vs -1)
✓ Active site geometry matches crystal
   (all Δ < 0.5 Å vs human SOD1)
✓ AlphaFold pLDDT > 94 for all 10 sites
✓ Disulfide SG-SG = 2.03 Å (ideal)

Architecture:
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Signal peptide → secreted protein
Large disordered N-terminal extension
C-terminal Cu/Zn-SOD catalytic domain
→ Resembles SOD3/EC-SOD architecture

Caveats:
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
• PROSITE PS00332 fails at non-binding 
  position (Ser replaces Glu50)
• No direct enzymatic assay data
• AlphaFold model lacks metal ions"""

ax4.text(0.05, 0.95, verdict_text, transform=ax4.transAxes, fontsize=10,
         verticalalignment='top', fontfamily='monospace',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.5', facecolor='#E8F8F5', edgecolor='#2ECC71', linewidth=2))

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('comprehensive_analysis.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: comprehensive_analysis.png")
